text_block_list.text:
I spot Neo Universe and a student I assume 
to be her classmate in a corridor after school, 
bits of something or other spread at their feet.

text_block_list.name: Classmate
text_block_list.text:
Aaahh, I'm so stupid. Look at this mess. 
Why the heck's this globe a 3D puzzle 
anyway, isn't it for class use…?

text_block_list.name: Neo Universe
text_block_list.text:
Neo Universe picked up ILLN. This covers 
36°58'–42°30'N 87°30'–91°30'W.

text_block_list.name: Classmate
text_block_list.text:
Wha? Uhhh… where does this piece go…? 
Thanks by the way!
Ah, they dropped a 3D puzzle of the earth. The pieces seem to be in the shape of countries and other large regions.

text_block_list.name: Classmate
text_block_list.text: Oh, thank you! Not gonna lie, I'm really lost. Countries? States? Provinces? You can't expect me to know where all of these go…

text_block_list.name: Neo Universe
text_block_list.text: ILLN: Docking complete.

I look up and see Neo Universe fit the piece 
she was holding perfectly into the American 
continent. What state was that again? If I'm 
not mistaken, it's near the Chicago area…

text_block_list.name: Neo Universe
text_block_list.text: HNK… MNC…

text_block_list.name: Neo Universe
text_block_list.text: …Dockings complete.

That first one's Hong Kong, and the other… 
Monaco? She seemed to have no trouble 
fitting these unnamed pieces together.
choice_data_list: <size=38>Can you actually locate every single place…?</size>
That's… a useful gift for puzzles like this.
That's… a useful gift for puzzles like this.

text_block_list.text:
That first one's Hong Kong, and the other… 
Monaco? She seemed to have no trouble 
fitting these unnamed pieces together.
choice_data_list: <size=38>Can you actually locate every single place…?</size>
That's… a useful gift for puzzles like this.
That's… a useful gift for puzzles like this.

text_block_list.text:
Does that mean those letters and numbers 
earlier were a hint of sorts? Curious, I show 
Neo Universe the piece making up Italy.

text_block_list.name: Neo Universe
text_block_list.text: That is… ITNA… it covers 37°–47°N 7°–19°E.

I quickly look up info on Italy online. 
The letters don't appear, are they a unique 
abbreviation of hers? The numbers roughly 
line up with its geographic coordinates.
choice_data_list: Ah, so you were telling us its coordinates!
Ah, so you were telling us its coordinates!

text_block_list.name: Classmate
text_block_list.text:
Huh? So… if we just ask Universe about 
the pieces we don't know… we'll get this 
done somehow, right!?

text_block_list.name: Classmate
text_block_list.text:
We did it! Who'd think you have latitudes 
and longitudes memorized though, that's 
incredible! You were a big help, thanks!

text_block_list.name: Neo Universe
text_block_list.text: …Heheh. You're… welcome.

It was subtle, but I thought this expression 
of gratitude effected a faint smile on Neo 
Universe's face.

I can only conclude that she has the whole 
world map memorized and can identify pieces 
in the blink of an eye. When I mention this…

text_block_list.name: Classmate
text_block_list.text:
For real?! Then… can you help me put this 
whole thing back together, Universe? 
Please, I don't think I can do it without you!
choice_data_list: Us two will do what we can too.
Us two will do what we can too.

text_block_list.name: Neo Universe
text_block_list.text: Affirmative. Send UKPs… Unknowns… to me.

text_block_list.name: Neo Universe
text_block_list.text: Neo Universe will apply Effort.

text_block_list.name: Classmate
text_block_list.text:
Aaah, I really couldn't have done it without 
you, thanks so much for helping out!
choice_data_list: That was a tough one, good job everyone!
That was a tough one, good job everyone!

text_block_list.name: Neo Universe
text_block_list.text: Puzzling together… is an ENJI experience.
